Every Drew Brees TD Pass
  • Opponent
  • Season
  • Week
  • Distance
  • Search

Drew Brees has thrown 608 touchdown passes in his NFL career. Below you will find every single one of them, organized in different ways.

TDs by Opponent

TDs by Season

TDs by Week

Drew Brees has thrown 37 playoff TDs which is about 6.1 % of his total TDs.

TDs by Receiver

Drew Brees has connected with Marques Colston for 76 touchdowns. He's also thrown TDs to 73 other players.

TDs by Distance

If you only count yards gained on passes that went for TDs, Drew Brees has accumulated 11,257 yards. That's more passing yards than Rex Grossman (11,015) threw in his entire career.
